title: DOCX Block Relocation Plan
description: Used by `blocks relocate <plan.json>` (ex qual-supply relocate_orphan_blocks.py) to move 'orphan' paragraph blocks (heading + downstream paragraphs/tables) from source_idx to target_idx with text anchoring for idx-drift resilience.

source_docx.description: docx 路径 (可选, 校验用)

source_end_idx.description: 段块结束 idx (含, 默认=source_idx)

text_anchor.description: 源段首文本片段, 二次锚定用

target_anchor.description: 目标位置前段文本片段
